title: Wir machen Musik
writer: Erich Ebermayer, Hans Effenberger, Helmut Käutner
actors: Ilse Werner, Viktor de Kowa, Edith Oß
plot: Caught at the window just before an air-raid warning (WWII) composer Paul tells how he met his wive Anni, a revue star and song writer, how he handled the courtship and the early years of his marriage, inspite of some professional...
